title: croton monanthogynus
intro: Croton monanthogynus, also known as the firebush, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton monanthogynus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and a remedy for various other ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils for its medicinal properties.
